title: Department of Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology Master's Program with/without Thesis Application and Fees
content:
Department of Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology Master's Program with/without Thesis Application and Fees

FORENSIC CHEMISTRY AND FORENSIC TOXICOLOGY MASTER'S PROGRAM WITH/WITHOUT THESIS

2023-2024 Spring Semester Online Applications have started as of 23.02.2024.

CLICK HERE FOR ONLINE APPLICATION >>>

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS:

Dear prospective students,

Applications will end on Wednesday, March 06, 2024.

Due to the new regulation sent to all higher education institutions by the Council of Higher Education (YÖK), 30 new students will be accepted to our non-thesis master's programs.

Thesis / non-thesis program applications

ALES score: 65%, (ALES/SAY Score) (55 points will be accepted if the candidate does not have an ALES score)

The equivalent of the undergraduate graduation grade point average in 100 system: 35%

will be calculated and the students who are eligible to be placed in the program will be announced.

The primary and reserve lists will be announced simultaneously, the candidates who are entitled to primary registration will be given 7 working days to register and then registration will start from the reserve list.

NOTE: CANDIDATES WHO ARE ELIGIBLE FOR FINAL REGISTRATION CAN REGISTER IMMEDIATELY AFTER THE EXAM RESULTS ARE ANNOUNCED.

- Original and one photocopy of undergraduate diploma

- Original and one photocopy of the undergraduate transcript

- ALES Exam result document (for thesis programs)

- Photocopy of Identity Card

- Passport Size Photograph (2 Pieces)

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri
